payload.answer: SQL debugging/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The SELECT statement was not executed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command, not a request to store or retrieve personal memory.

details: Rejected admin SQL request: debug SQL execution is disabled.
No memory cards were created or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate debug/admin environment before running SQL diagnostics.
Use a non-SQL Brain admin/debug command if available.
